chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْقَوْلِ عِنْدَ الْخُرُوجِ مِنْ بَيْتِهِ وَ فَضْلِ الصَّدَقَةِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 45 – The words (to be spoken) during the going out from his house, and the merits of the charity

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (17/175)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (17/175)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) تَصَدَّقْ وَ اخْرُجْ أَيَّ يَوْمٍ شِئْتَ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Mahboub,from Abdul Rahman Bin Al Hajjal who said,
‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Give charity and go out in whichever day you so desire to’.
en.sarwar: 4. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn Mahbub from ‘Abd al-Rahman ibn al-Hajjaj who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘You should give charity and leave for your journey any time you like.’”
